title: Interior and Closure of a Set in a Metric Space
description: A visual representation of the concepts of interior points, boundary points, closure, and their relationships within a subset A of a metric space X.
relationships: An interior point has an open ball completely contained within A
A boundary point has open balls that intersect both A and its complement
The closure Ā is the union of A and its limit points
The closure Ā is also equal to the union of the interior and the boundary
A set is closed if it equals its closure
A set is open if it equals its interior
